'''Don Danga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the patriarch of the [[Danga family]] on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Soldier for the Empire" /> In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> [[Danga estate|his estate]] was attacked by a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] controlled by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] commandos of the [[Ghost Battalion]], in an attempt to blame the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. When his family was killed, Don Danga was around his maintenance shed and tried to hit the freighter with a [[SLM|shoulder-launched device]]. Energy bolts hit him and the missile he was trying to reload, and he disappeared in an explosion blast.<ref name="Soldier for the Empire" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
